zh.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianora de Balliol於1246年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親John de Balliol11243歲，母親Devorguilla of Galloway36歲。她於大約1273年與John Comyn II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1302年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登享年56歲。

zh-hans.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianora de Balliol于1246年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲John de Balliol11243岁，母亲Devorguilla of Galloway36岁。她于大约1273年与John Comyn II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1302年在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alianora
meanings: Same as Elener, Ellinor, and Eleanor

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianora de Balliol was born in 1246, in Durham, England, her father, John de Balliol, was 11243 and her mother, Devorguilla of Galloway, was 36. She married John Comyn II about 1273, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1302, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianora de Balliol est née en 1246, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, John de Balliol, avait 11243 ans et sa mère, Devorguilla of Galloway, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Comyn II environ 1273, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1302, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianora de Balliol 1246 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Balliol 11243 und ihre Mutter Devorguilla of Galloway 36. Sie hat um 1273 in England John Comyn II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1302 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianora de Balliol è nata il nel 1246 nel Durham, England, sua padre, John de Balliol, aveva 11243 anni e sua madre, Devorguilla of Galloway, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Comyn II circa 1273, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1302, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムバーナルド カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Alianora de Balliolが1246年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父John de Balliolは11243歳，母Devorguilla of Gallowayは36歳であった。約1273年にイギリスでJohn Comyn IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1302年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianora de Balliol(이)가 1246년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Balliol(은)는 11243세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Devorguilla of Galloway(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1273년 영국에서 John Comyn II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianora de Balliol nasceu em 1246, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Balliol, tinha 11243 anos e sua mãe, Devorguilla of Galloway, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Comyn II aproximadamente 1273, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1302, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianora de Balliol родилась в 1246 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Balliol было 11243 года, а матери, которую звали Devorguilla of Galloway, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Comyn II около 1273 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1302 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianora de Balliol nació en 1246, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Balliol, tenía 11243 años y su mamá, Devorguilla of Galloway, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Comyn II aproximadamente 1273, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1302, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 56 años.
